targets.rawSql:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT
    date,
    sum(net_revenue) AS day_revenue
  FROM analytics.publisher_daily
  WHERE date >= toStartOfMonth(today())
    AND date <= today()
    AND publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})
  GROUP BY date
)
SELECT
  max(date) AS time,
  round(
    16400.0 / (dateDiff('day', toStartOfMonth(max(date)), toLastDayOfMonth(max(date))) + 1)
    + 0.0245 * argMax(day_revenue, date),
    2
  ) AS Yesterday,
  round(
    16400.0 * count(DISTINCT date)
      / (dateDiff('day', toStartOfMonth(max(date)), toLastDayOfMonth(max(date))) + 1)
    + 0.0245 * sum(day_revenue),
    2
  ) AS MTD,
  round(
    16400.0
    + 0.0245 * (
        sum(day_revenue) / count(DISTINCT date)
          * (dateDiff('day', toStartOfMonth(max(date)), toLastDayOfMonth(max(date))) + 1)
      ),
    2
  ) AS Projected
FROM daily

SELECT
  max(date) AS time,
  round(sum(impressions) * 100 / nullIf(sum(inventory), 0), 4) AS fill_rate
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})

SELECT
  max(date) AS time,
  round(sum(net_revenue) * 1000 / nullIf(sum(impressions), 0), 4) AS ecpm
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})

SELECT
  max(date) AS time,
  round(sumIf(impressions, publisher_id = 2800) * 100 / nullIf(sumIf(bids_won, publisher_id = 2800), 0), 4) AS brightcom_stations_efficiency,
  round(sumIf(impressions, publisher_id = 2947) * 100 / nullIf(sumIf(bids_won, publisher_id = 2947), 0), 4) AS espot_stations_efficiency,
  round(sumIf(impressions, publisher_id = 2948) * 100 / nullIf(sumIf(bids_won, publisher_id = 2948), 0), 4) AS brightcom_podcasts_efficiency
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})

WITH daily AS (
  SELECT
    date,
    toStartOfMonth(date) AS month,
    sum(net_revenue) AS day_revenue
  FROM analytics.publisher_daily
  WHERE date >= toStartOfMonth(today()) - INTERVAL 1 MONTH
    AND date <= today()
    AND publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})
  GROUP BY date
)
SELECT
  maxIf(date, month = toStartOfMonth(today())) AS time,

  -- Today (most recent day in current month)
  round(argMaxIf(day_revenue, date, month = toStartOfMonth(today())), 2) AS Revenue_Yesterday,

  -- Month to date
  round(sumIf(day_revenue, month = toStartOfMonth(today())), 2) AS Revenue_MTD,

  -- Projected month (straight-line from run-rate)
  round(
    sumIf(day_revenue, month = toStartOfMonth(today()))
      / countIf(month = toStartOfMonth(today()))
      * (dateDiff('day', toStartOfMonth(today()), toLastDayOfMonth(today())) + 1),
    2
  ) AS Revenue_Projected,

  -- Previous full month (actual)
  round(sumIf(day_revenue, month < toStartOfMonth(today())), 2) AS Revenue_LastMonth

FROM daily

SELECT
  date AS time,
  round(sum(net_revenue), 2) AS revenue
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date

SELECT
  date AS time,
  round(sum(net_revenue) * 1000 / nullIf(sum(impressions), 0), 4) AS ecpm
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date

SELECT
  date AS time,
  round(sum(impressions) * 100 / nullIf(sum(inventory), 0), 4) AS fill_rate
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
  AND publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date

SELECT
  date AS time,
  round(sumIf(net_revenue, publisher_id = 2947), 2) AS espot_stations,
  round(sumIf(net_revenue, publisher_id = 2800), 2) AS brightcom_stations,
  round(sumIf(net_revenue, publisher_id = 2948), 2) AS brightcom_podcasts
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date

SELECT
  date AS time,
  round(sumIf(net_revenue, publisher_id = 2947) * 1000 / nullIf(sumIf(impressions, publisher_id = 2947), 0), 4) AS espot_stations,
  round(sumIf(net_revenue, publisher_id = 2800) * 1000 / nullIf(sumIf(impressions, publisher_id = 2800), 0), 4) AS brightcom_stations,
  round(sumIf(net_revenue, publisher_id = 2948) * 1000 / nullIf(sumIf(impressions, publisher_id = 2948), 0), 4) AS brightcom_podcasts
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date

SELECT
  date AS time,
  round(sumIf(impressions, publisher_id = 2947 AND publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})) * 100 / nullIf(sumIf(inventory, publisher_id = 2947 AND publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})), 0), 4) AS espot_stations,
  round(sumIf(impressions, publisher_id = 2800 AND publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})) * 100 / nullIf(sumIf(inventory, publisher_id = 2800 AND publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})), 0), 4) AS brightcom_stations,
  round(sumIf(impressions, publisher_id = 2948 AND publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})) * 100 / nullIf(sumIf(inventory, publisher_id = 2948 AND publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})), 0), 4) AS brightcom_podcasts
FROM analytics.publisher_daily
WHERE $__timeFilter(date)
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date

WITH latest AS
(
  SELECT
    publisher_name,
    max(date) AS latest_date
  FROM analytics.publisher_daily
  WHERE publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})
  GROUP BY publisher_name
)
SELECT
  pd.publisher_name,
  pd.date,
  pd.impressions,
  round(pd.net_revenue, 2) AS net_revenue,
  round(pd.net_revenue * 1000 / nullIf(pd.impressions, 0), 4) AS ecpm,
  round(pd.impressions * 100 / nullIf(pd.inventory, 0), 4) AS fill_rate
FROM analytics.publisher_daily pd
INNER JOIN latest l
  ON pd.publisher_name = l.publisher_name
 AND pd.date = l.latest_date
ORDER BY pd.publisher_name

SELECT
  date,
  multiIf(
    publisher_id = 2947, 'espot_stations',
    publisher_id = 2800, 'brightcom_stations',
    publisher_id = 2948, 'brightcom_podcasts',
    publisher_name
  ) AS publisher,
  net_revenue,
  ecpm,
  fill_rate,
  revenue_dod_pct,
  ecpm_dod_pct,
  fill_rate_dod_pct,
  revenue_vs_prev_7d_pct,
  ecpm_vs_prev_7d_pct,
  fill_rate_vs_prev_7d_pct
FROM analytics.v_grafana_publisher_anomalies
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND publisher_name IN (${publisher:singlequote})
ORDER BY date DESC, abs(ecpm_vs_prev_7d_pct) DESC
LIMIT 100

list.definition: SELECT publisher_name AS __text, toString(publisher_id) AS __value FROM analytics.publisher_daily GROUP BY publisher_id, publisher_name ORDER BY publisher_name
list.label: Publisher
list.name: publisher
list.query: SELECT publisher_name AS __text, toString(publisher_id) AS __value FROM analytics.publisher_daily GROUP BY publisher_id, publisher_name ORDER BY publisher_name
